scripts.dev:electron: tsup src/electron/main.ts src/electron/preload.ts --outDir dist-electron --external electron && concurrently "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.dev:all: tsup src/electron/main.ts src/electron/preload.ts --outDir dist-electron --external electron && concurrently "uv run python -m backend.main" "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.build:electron: next build && tsup src/electron/main.ts src/electron/preload.ts --outDir dist-electron --external electron && electron-builder
